Dirty Dancing Havana Nights (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,140,215Details
International Box Office $123,084
Worldwide Box Office $14,263,299
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,811,325 (41.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.43 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,042 opening theaters/2,042 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $27,233,004

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 27th, 2004 (Wide) by Lionsgate, released as Havana Nights: Dirty Dancing 2
International Releases: May 13th, 2004 (Wide), released as Dirty Dancing: Havana Nights (Australia)
Video Release: July 20th, 2004 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment, released as Dirty Dancing 2: Havana Nights
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sensuality
Running Time: 86 minutes
Franchise: Dirty Dancing
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake, Remake with Returning Cast Member
Geographical setting: Cuba
Plot point: Dancing, Romance
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Time period setting: 1950s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Spanish
